channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Wisconsin Democrat touts union endorsement amid pushback against CDL restrictions for undocumented drivers
item.description: Rebecca Cooke highlights support from AFSCME, which released a guide on bypassing CDL rules for undocumented immigrants.

item.title: Blue state governor criticized as 'arsonist' blaming outsiders for unrest at Newark facility
item.description: Gov. Mikie Sherrill attributes Delaney Hall clashes to out-of-state agitators, while critics cite insufficient police presence before the violence.

item.title: Steve Hilton tells Newsmax he can turn California red
item.description: Gubernatorial candidate Steve Hilton said Monday that finishing in the top two in the primary could allow him to transform California's political landscape.

item.title: New pro-Spencer Pratt ad humorously dismantles leftist ideology
